overall.description: A samurai warrior stands on a traditional wooden viewing platform overlooking a vast mountainous landscape under dramatic storm clouds. The video game footage features cinematic third-person perspective with atmospheric wind effects and desaturated green color grading.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden viewing platform overlooking mountain valley

character turns head to survey the right side of the landscape

agents.ego_description: samurai stands still on wooden platform, gazing out at the stormy mountain landscape while wind blows through his straw hat and cloak

entered.detail: wooden balustrade of the viewing platform in the immediate foreground
vertical wooden post supporting the roof structure on the left side
distant mountain ridge visible through the storm clouds
dense green and yellow treetops covering the valley below
dark dramatic cloud cover filling the sky above the mountains

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands on a traditional wooden viewing platform, sheltered under a roof structure, looking out over a vast valley of dense forests and distant mountains. The wind moves through his cloak and hat as he slowly turns his head to survey the stormy landscape, with dark clouds filling the sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, atmospheric gaze from a sheltered vantage point across a vast, storm-swept wilderness. It begins with the samurai standing still on a traditional wooden viewing platform, framed by the overhead roof structure as he overlooks a deep valley of dense forests. As the wind whips through his cloak and hat, the camera lingers on his presence against the backdrop of distant, looming mountains. The scene then shifts focus as the warrior slowly turns his head, surveying the horizon while dark, dramatic clouds continue to fill the oppressive sky above.
